_comment: MCP servers for this skill set. IMPORTANT: this file belongs at your PROJECT ROOT (next to .claude/), not inside .claude/. The accesslint server powers the accesslint-* skills (live-DOM WCAG auditing via Chrome DevTools Protocol); without it those skills are inert. It is third-party and launches on demand via npx — review @accesslint/mcp before enabling if that matters to you. Remove this block if you don't want it.
